raw_consumer_statement: Hired a moving company, and brought what I was told was insurance by said company for damage of goods ( if ) damaged during move. Move completed but goods damaged. Paid company in full for bill an said insurance. Filed claim as told, was told that they arent insurance company any proceeded to not provide me adequate restitution after several attempts to comply. Filed dispute with my credit card company was denied after investigation and with trying to follow-up havent been able to resolve problem with what I subsequently asked for damages.
